data.title: Correction: Suspension of oral hygiene practices highlights key bacterial shifts in saliva, tongue, and tooth plaque during gingival inflammation and resolution
data.authors: Michael William Hall, Nimali Chandhema Wellappuli, Ruo Chen Huang, Kay Wu, David King Lam, Michael Glogauer, Robert Gerald Beiko, Dilani Braziunas Senadheera
data.description: Correction: Suspension of oral hygiene practices highlights key bacterial shifts in saliva, tongue, and tooth plaque during ging Page 1 CORRECTION OPEN Correction: Suspension of oral hygiene practices highlights key bacterial shifts in saliva, tongue, and tooth plaque during gingival inflammation and resolution Michael William Hall, Nimali Chandhema Wellappuli , Ruo Chen Huang, Kay Wu, David King Lam, Michael Glogauer, Robert Gerald Beiko and Dilani Braziunas Senadheera © The Author(s) 2023 ISME Communications; https://doi.org/10.1038/s43705-023-00258-0 Correction to: ISME Communications https://doi.org/10.1038/s43705023-00229-5, published online 25 March 2023 In this article the author name David King Lam was incorrectly written as David Kitping Lam. The original article has been corrected. Open Access This article is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International …
